sources.description: Perform a structured Kubernetes review across reliability, security, rollout safety, networking, storage, policy, and observability, then produce prioritized findings and next steps.

sources.description: Perform a structured Terraform review across state safety, module quality, provider discipline, IAM, drift, rollout risk, and cost, then produce prioritized findings and next steps.

sources.name: codex-swarm
sources.title: Codex Swarm Skill
sources.description: Orchestrate Codex CLI agents in tmux panes. Use for: delegate task to codex, run multiple codex agents, swarm agents, parallel codex tasks, split work across agents, monitor agent progress. Modes: /delegate (single agent) and /swarm (multiple pipe-delimited agents).

sources.name: codex-swarm
sources.title: Codex Swarm Skill
sources.description: Orchestrate Codex CLI agents in Zellij panes. Use for: delegate task to codex, run multiple codex agents, swarm agents, parallel codex tasks, split work across agents, monitor agent progress. Modes: /delegate (single agent) and /swarm (multiple pipe-delimited agents).

sources.name: colorize
sources.description: Add strategic color to features that are too monochromatic or lack visual interest. Makes interfaces more engaging and expressive.

sources.name: cost-terraform
sources.description: Review Terraform-managed infrastructure for encoded waste, oversizing, unnecessary always-on resources, and missing retention or tiering controls.

sources.name: critique
sources.description: Evaluate design effectiveness from a UX perspective. Assesses visual hierarchy, information architecture, emotional resonance, and overall design quality with actionable feedback.

sources.name: debug-k8s
sources.description: Diagnose Kubernetes failures across workloads, networking, configuration, scheduling, policy, and runtime behavior. Produces an evidence-based root-cause summary and the smallest safe next action.

sources.name: debug-terraform
sources.description: Diagnose Terraform failures across config, state, providers, dependency graphs, imports, and remote API behavior. Produces an evidence-based root-cause summary and the smallest safe next action.

sources.name: delegate-codex

sources.name: distill

sources.name: drift-terraform

sources.name: forge
sources.title: Forge
sources.description: Forge a markdown plan into reviewed, merged code. Distributes tasks across parallel Codex agents in isolated worktrees, runs CodeRabbit → code-simplifier review-fix loops, RepoPrompt final gate, and merges to feature branch. Use for: forge plan, execute plan, implement plan, run plan, forge feature, build from plan, plan to code, plan to branch.

sources.name: frontend-design
sources.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

sources.name: gitbutler
sources.title: GitButler CLI Skill
sources.description: Commit, push, branch, and manage version control with GitButler. Use for: commit my changes, check what changed, create a PR, push my branch, view diff, create branches, stage files, edit commit history, squash commits, amend commits, undo commits, pull requests, merge, stash work. Replaces git - use 'but' instead of git commit, git status, git push, git checkout, git add, git diff, git branch, git rebase, git stash, git merge. Covers all git, version control, and source control operations.

sources.name: gtr
sources.title: Git Worktree Runner (gtr) Skill
sources.description: Manage git worktrees for parallel AI agent development with gtr (Git Worktree Runner). Use for: create worktree, new worktree, parallel branches, isolated workspace, run AI in worktree, open editor in worktree, list worktrees, remove worktree, worktree status, parallel agent development, git worktree. Wraps git worktree with quality-of-life automation, editor integration, and AI tool launching.

sources.name: peon-ping-config

sources.description: Update peon-ping configuration — volume, pack rotation, categories, active pack, and other settings. Use when user wants to change peon-ping settings like volume, enable round-robin, add packs to rotation, toggle sound categories, or adjust any config.

sources.name: peon-ping-toggle
sources.title: peon-ping-toggle
sources.description: Toggle peon-ping sound notifications on/off. Use when user wants to mute, unmute, pause, or resume peon sounds during a Claude Code session. Also handles config changes like volume, pack rotation, categories — any peon-ping setting.

sources.name: plan-build
sources.title: Plan-Build Skill
sources.description: Iterative implementation plan builder using Codex for codebase analysis. Use for: implementation plan, architecture plan, design plan, plan builder, plan build, structured planning, codex plan. Claude asks clarifying questions, delegates drafting to Codex, reviews strictly, iterates until quality bar met, saves to docs/plans/.

sources.name: plan-build
sources.title: Plan-Build Skill
sources.description: Iterative implementation plan builder using Codex for codebase analysis. Use for: implementation plan, architecture plan, design plan, plan builder, plan build, structured planning, codex plan. Claude asks clarifying questions, delegates drafting to Codex, reviews strictly, iterates until quality bar met, saves to docs/plans/.

sources.name: plan-build-rp
sources.title: Plan Build RP
sources.description: Build implementation plans using RepoPrompt as the drafting engine. Iterative plan-chat loop with manage_workspaces + manage_selection + chat_send until A+ quality or max 10 iterations. Use for: repoprompt plan, rp plan, plan with repoprompt, plan build rp, build plan rp, repoprompt architecture, rp implementation plan.

sources.name: plan-terraform
sources.description: Prepare and review Terraform changes with explicit blast-radius analysis, replacement risk, sequencing, and rollback realism before apply.

sources.name: policy-k8s
sources.description: Review and improve Kubernetes policy and access controls across RBAC, service accounts, pod security, admission policy, and secret exposure boundaries.

sources.name: policy-terraform
sources.description: Review and improve Terraform policy and control posture across IAM, tagging, encryption, exposure boundaries, policy-as-code, and organizational guardrails.

sources.name: polish
sources.description: Final quality pass before shipping. Fixes alignment, spacing, consistency, and detail issues that separate good from great.

sources.name: prompt-repeat
sources.title: prompt-repeat
sources.description: Apply prompt repetition to a task for improved accuracy (arxiv:2512.14982). Repeats the original task at the end of context before answering to anchor the model. Use for: prompt repeat, repeat prompt, anchor task, prompt repetition, improve accuracy, non-reasoning boost.

sources.name: quality-gate
sources.title: Quality Gate (Language-Agnostic)
sources.description: Run a language-agnostic quality gate using independent reviewer findings and Definition of Done checks, then drive CodeRabbit cleanup and final application verification. Use for: second-pass review, subagent quality gate, approve or needs-changes decision, merge readiness, ship/no-ship call, design consistency gate, simplicity/elegance review.

sources.name: quieter
sources.description: Tone down overly bold or visually aggressive designs. Reduces intensity while maintaining design quality and impact.

sources.name: ralph-forge
sources.title: Ralph Forge
sources.description: Forge a plan with ralph-loop auto-retry. Combines /ralph-loop with /forge — iterates until the plan is fully implemented, reviewed, and merged. Use for: ralph forge, loop forge, auto forge, persistent forge, forge until done, implement plan with retries.

sources.name: ralph-review-cr
sources.title: Ralph Review CR
sources.description: CodeRabbit review-fix loop with ralph-loop auto-retry. Combines /ralph-loop with /review-cr — iterates until all findings are resolved or max iterations reached. Use for: ralph review, persistent review, review until clean, auto review fix, ralph coderabbit, review-cr with retries.

sources.name: recover-k8s
sources.description: Incident-mode Kubernetes recovery skill that stabilizes service, preserves evidence, limits blast radius, and guides rollback or remediation under pressure.

sources.name: recover-terraform
sources.description: Incident-mode Terraform recovery skill that stabilizes impacted infrastructure, preserves evidence, limits blast radius, and guides rollback or repair under pressure.

sources.name: regression-tests
sources.title: Regression Tests Skill
sources.description: Create a deterministic regression test for a fixed bug or difficult issue. Adds a new case under tests/regression/<index>-<descriptive-title>/ and wires it into CI via a stable runner script, using the repo's existing test framework when possible.

sources.name: regression-tests
sources.title: Regression Tests Skill

sources.name: review-rp
